claims.summary: Burst-to-rest warmth needs a complete taper rather than an abrupt retraction.
claims.disposition: verify the complete piecewise taper and continuous boundary behavior

claims.summary: Warmth phase and vector magnitude should remain bounded through rest.
claims.disposition: verify focused phase, breathing, scaling, and blending tests

claims.summary: At 25 percent fill, rest should shorten to about 0.6 of base without collapsing cadence.
claims.disposition: verify the fill-shortening formula and 30-second lower bound

claims.summary: Changing warmth intensity, rest cadence, or recovery thresholds changes live autonomous behavior.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
